Part.Source:
//verifica id da sessao. verificaidsessao.Call(&DevRandon, &IsAcessoConcedido, &IsAtualizaTudo, &wwpContext)
if &IsAcessoConcedido = true //Acesso concedido
if &OqueFazer = 'INICIO' and &MdfeCod = 0
For Each ORder EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &wwpContext.EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod &sdtMdfe.FilRaz = iif(FilNom.IsEmpty() or FilNom.IsNull(), FilRaz, FilNom) &sdtMdfe.OriUfeCod = FilCidUfeCod &sdtMdfe.OriUfeNom = FilCidUfeNom &sdtMdfe.OriCidCod = FilCidCod &sdtMdfe.OriCidNom = FilCidNom &sdtMdfe.OriCep = FilCep Exit EndFor
&sdtMdfe.DestUfeCod = '' &sdtMdfe.DestUfeNom = '' &sdtMdfe.DestCidCod = 0 &sdtMdfe.DestCidNom = '' &sdtMdfe.DestCep = ''
&sdtMDfe.MDFeAdc = '' &sdtMdfe.MDFeSts = Status_MDFe.Digitando &sdtMdfe.sts = 'J200' return Endif
For Each ORder EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod Where EmpCod = &wwpContext.EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where MDFeCod = &MdfeCod
&sdtMdfe.MDFeSts = MDFeSts &sdtMdfe.TipEmt = MDFeTipEmt
Do Case Case &OqueFazer = 'ENVIAREMAIL'
if MDFeTipEmt <> MDFe_TipoEmitente.NaoPrestador &SdtEmail.Clear() For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod,MDFeCod, MDFeCteItm
&MdfeNum = MDFeNum &sdtMdfe.c1 = 'Manifesto de Conhecimento de Transporte ' + trim(toformattedString(&MdfeNum)) + ' da ' + trim(FilFan)
&MDFeCteCod = MDFeCteCod &MDFeCteFilCod = MDFeCteFilCod
Do 'CarregaCte' EndFor Else For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod,MDFeCod,MDFeNFeItm &MdfeNum = MDFeNum &sdtMdfe.c1 = 'Manifesto de Conhecimento de Transporte ' + trim(toformattedString(&MdfeNum)) + ' da ' + trim(FilRaz)
&MdfeNfeCod = MDFeNfeCod &MDFeNFeFilCod = MDFeNFeFilCod Do 'CarregaNfe' EndFor Endif
For &ItemSdtEmail in &SdtEmail Do Case Case &sdtMdfe.c2.IsEmpty() &sdtMdfe.c2 = &ItemSdtEmail.EmlUrl
Case &sdtMdfe.c3.IsEmpty() &sdtMdfe.c3 = &ItemSdtEmail.EmlUrl
Case &sdtMdfe.c4.IsEmpty() &sdtMdfe.c4 = &ItemSdtEmail.EmlUrl
Case &sdtMdfe.c5.IsEmpty() &sdtMdfe.c5 = &ItemSdtEmail.EmlUrl
Case &sdtMdfe.c6.IsEmpty() &sdtMdfe.c6 = &ItemSdtEmail.EmlUrl
Case &sdtMdfe.c7.IsEmpty() &sdtMdfe.c7 = &ItemSdtEmail.EmlUrl
Otherwise Exit EndCAse EndFor
&sdtMdfe.sts = 'J200' return
Case &OqueFazer = 'GETPDF' RetornaConfiguracoesPastas.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, &SdtCOnfiguracoesPasta)
&URLFisico = &SdtCOnfiguracoesPasta.PastaNFpdf + 'MDFe'+ MDFeChv.Trim() + '.pdf' &URLVirtual = &SdtCOnfiguracoesPasta.PastaNFpdfVir +'MDFe'+ MDFeChv.Trim() + '.pdf'
&File.Source = &URLFisico
If &File.Exists() &File.Delete() EndIf
RELJAS013_ToFile.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod, &URLFisico) &sdtMdfe.sts = 'J200' &sdtMdfe.obs = &URLVirtual return
case &OqueFazer = 'STS' &sdtMdfe.sts = 'J200' &sdtMdfe.obs = '' return
case &OqueFazer = 'MODAL' If MDFeRNTRC.Trim().IsEmpty() &sdtMdfe.RNTRC = FilRNTRC Else &sdtMdfe.RNTRC = MDFeRNTRC EndIf
//Contratante &sdtMdfe.ConCnpj = MdfeConCnpj &sdtMdfe.ConRaz = MdfeConRaz
&sdtMdfe.CatComVei = MdfeCatComVei
//Fornecedor For Each ORder EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod, MdfePedCod Where MdfePedCod = 1 &sdtMdfe.PedCnpjFor = MdfePedCnpjFor
&sdtMdfe.PedNroCom = MdfePedNroCom //Pagador &sdtMdfe.PedResPag = MdfePedResPag &sdtMdfe.PedVlrVar = trim(toformattedString(MdfePedVlr)) &sdtMdfe.PedTip = MdfePedTip.ToFormattedString() Exit When none &sdtMdfe.PedTip = '00' EndFor
//CIOT For Each ORder EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod, MdfeCiotCod &Ciot = new() &Ciot.Nro = MDFeCIOT &Ciot.Cod = MdfeCiotCod &sdtMdfe.Ciot.Add(&Ciot) EndFor
&sdtMdfe.sts = 'J200' &sdtMdfe.obs = '' return
CAse &OqueFazer = 'VEICULO'
//TRACAO For Each ORder EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod, MDFeVeiCod &VeiCod = MDFeVeiCod do 'getVeiculo' &sdtMdfe.VeiPlaca = MDFeVeiPla &sdtMdfe.VeiModelo = &VeiMod &sdtMdfe.VeiTipCarr = MDFeVeiTipCar &sdtMdfe.VeiTipRod = MDFeVeiTipRod
Exit Endfor
//MOTORISTA For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod, MDFeMotCod &Motorista = new() &Motorista.Cod = MDFeMotCod &Motorista.Nom = MDFeMotNom &Motorista.Cpf = MDFeMotCpf
&sdtMdfe.Mot.Add(&Motorista) EndFor
//REBOQUE For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod, MDFeRebCod &reboque = new() &reboque.Cod = MDFeRebCod &reboque.Placa = MDFeRebPla &reboque.TipCar = MDFeRebTipCar &reboque.TipRod = MDFERebTipRod
&sdtMdfe.Reb.Add(&reboque) EndFor
&sdtMdfe.sts = 'J200' &sdtMdfe.obs = '' return
CAse &OqueFazer = 'PERCURSO' &sdtMdfe.OriUfeCod = MDFeOriUfeCod &sdtMdfe.DestUfeCod = MDFeDstUfeCod &sdtMdfe.DesCidCod = MDFeDesCidCod
//Ultima cidade de destino &CidCod = MDFeDesCidCod do 'getCidade' &sdtMdfe.DesCidNom = &CidNom &sdtMdfe.DesUfeCod = &UfeCod &sdtMdfe.DesUfeNom = &UfeNom
//Dados de seguro For Each ORder EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod, MdfeSegCod &sdtMdfe.MdfeSegRef = MdfeSegRef &sdtMdfe.MdfeSegNom = MdfeSegNom &sdtMdfe.MdfeSegNroApo = MdfeSegNroApo &sdtMdfe.MdfeSegRes = MdfeSegRes
if MdfeSegRef.IsEmpty() or MdfeSegRef.IsNull() &sdtMdfe.MdfeSegRef = 0 &sdtMdfe.MdfeSegNom = FilRaz Endif
Exit when none &sdtMdfe.MdfeSegRes = ResponsavelSeguro.Emitente
&sdtMdfe.MdfeSegRef = 0 &sdtMdfe.MdfeSegNom = FilRaz
EndFor
do 'addUF' do 'averbacao'
&sdtMdfe.sts = 'J200' &sdtMdfe.obs = '' return
Case &OqueFazer = 'INICIO' &sdtMdfe.FilRaz = iif(FilNom.IsEmpty() or FilNom.IsNull(), FilRaz, FilNom) &sdtMdfe.OriUfeCod = MDFeOriUfeCod &sdtMdfe.OriUfeNom = retornaNomeEstado.Udp(EmpCod, MDFeOriUfeCod) &sdtMdfe.OriCidCod = MDFeCarCidCod &sdtMdfe.OriCidNom = RetornaNomeCidade.Udp(EmpCod, MDFeCarCidCod) &sdtMdfe.OriCep = formataCEP.Udp(MDFeLotCarCep)
&sdtMdfe.DestUfeCod = MDFeDstUfeCod &sdtMdfe.DestUfeNom = retornaNomeEstado.Udp(EmpCod, MDFeDstUfeCod) &sdtMdfe.DestCidCod = MDFeDesCidCod &sdtMdfe.DestCidNom = RetornaNomeCidade.Udp(EmpCod, MDFeDesCidCod) &sdtMdfe.DestCep = formataCEP.Udp(MDFeLotDesCep) &sdtMdfe.MDFeAdc = MDFeAdc
&sdtMdfe.MDFeTipEmt = MDFeTipEmt // &sdtMdfe.MdfeModCod = mdfeModCod
&sdtMdfe.MDFeTipTra = MDFeTipTra
&sdtMdfe.sts = 'J200' &sdtMdfe.obs = '' return
Case &OqueFazer = 'DOCUMENTOS' &sdtMdfe.DesCidCod = MDFeDesCidCod
//Ultima cidade de destino &CidCod = MDFeDesCidCod do 'getCidade' &sdtMdfe.DesCidNom = &CidNom &sdtMdfe.DesUfeCod = &UfeCod
&sdtMdfe.MDFeProPre = MDFeProPre &sdtMdfe.MDFeTipCar = MDFeTipCar
&sdtMdfe.MDfeUnd = MDfeUnd &sdtMdfe.MDFeVlrTotVar = trim(toformattedString(MDFeVlrTot))
if MDFeTipEmt = MDFe_TipoEmitente.Prestador or MDFeTipEmt = MDFe_TipoEmitente.Globalizado do 'addCtes' Else do 'addNotas' Endif
&sdtMdfe.sts = 'J200' &sdtMdfe.obs = '' return EndCAse
Exit When none &sdtMdfe.sts = 'E998' &sdtMdfe.obs = 'MDFe não localizado!' return Endfor Else &sdtMdfe.sts = 'E999' &sdtMdfe.obs = 'Nada mais aqui!' return Endif
sub 'getVeiculo' For each Order EmpCod, VeiCod Where EmpCod = &wwpContext.EmpCod Where VeiCod = &VeiCod &VeiMod = VeiMod exit EndFor EndSub
sub 'getCidade' For Each ORder EmpCod, CidCod Where EmpCod = &wwpContext.EmpCod Where CidCod = &CidCod
&CidNom = CidNom &UfeCod = UfeCod &UfeNom = UfeNom Exit EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'averbacao' For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod, MdfeSegCod, MdfeSegNroAve Where EmpCod = &wwpContext.EmpCod WHere FilCod = &FilCod Where MDFeCod = &MDFeCod Where MdfeSegCod = 1
&Ave = new() &Ave.NroAve = MdfeSegNroAve
&sdtMdfe.Ave.Add(&Ave) EndFor EndSub
Sub 'addUF' For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod, MDFePerCod Where EmpCod = &wwpContext.EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where MDFeCod = &MDFeCod
&Ufs = new() &Ufs.UFId = MDFePerCod &Ufs.UFs = MDFePerUfeCod &Ufs.UFNom = retornaNomeEstado.Udp(EmpCod, MDFePerUfeCod) &sdtMdfe.Ufs.Add(&Ufs) EndFor EndSub
sub 'addNotas' For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod, MDFeNFeItm Where EmpCod = &wwpContext.EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where MDFeCod = &MdfeCod
&Ctes = new() &Ctes.Itm = MDFeNFeItm &Ctes.FilCod = MDFeNFeFilCod &Ctes.Cod = MDFeNfeCod &Ctes.Chv = MDFeNfeChv &Ctes.Chv2 = MDFeNfeChv2 &Ctes.CidCod = MDfeNfeCidCod &Ctes.CidNom = MDFeNfeCidNom &Ctes.UfeCod = MdfeNfeUfeCod &Ctes.VlrTotVar = trim(toformattedString(MDFeNfeVlrTot)) &Ctes.PsoVar = trim(toformattedString(MDfeNfePso))
&sdtMdfe.Docs.Add(&Ctes) EndFor
EndSub
sub 'addCtes' For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod, MDFeCteItm Where EmpCod = &wwpContext.EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod Where MDFeCod = &MdfeCod
&Ctes = new() &Ctes.Itm = MDFeCteItm &Ctes.FilCod = MDFeCteFilCod &Ctes.Cod = MDFeCteCod &Ctes.Chv = MDFeCteChv &Ctes.Chv2 = MDFeCteChv2 &Ctes.CidCod = MDfeCteCidCod &Ctes.CidNom = MDFeCteCidNom &Ctes.UfeCod = MdfeCteUfeCod &Ctes.VlrTotVar = trim(toformattedString(MDFeCteVlrTot)) &Ctes.PsoVar = trim(toformattedString(MDfeCtePso))
&sdtMdfe.Docs.Add(&Ctes) EndFor EndSub
Sub 'carregacte'
For each order EmpCod,FilCod,CteCod Where EmpCod = &wwpContext.EmpCod Where FilCod = &MDFeCteFilCod Where CteCod = &MDFeCteCod
Do Case Case &FilEnvEml = EmailEnvolvidosCte.SomenteRemetente //REMETENTE RetornaEmailFaturamento.Call(EmpCod, CteRemCod, &SdtEmail) Case &FilEnvEml = EmailEnvolvidosCte.Somentedestinatario //DESTINATÁRIO RetornaEmailFaturamento.Call(EmpCod, CteDesCod, &SdtEmail) Case &FilEnvEml = EmailEnvolvidosCte.SomenteTomador //TOMADOR RetornaEmailFaturamento.Call(EmpCod, CteTomCod, &SdtEmail) Case &FilEnvEml = EmailEnvolvidosCte.RemetenteDestinatario //REMETENTE RetornaEmailFaturamento.Call(EmpCod, CteRemCod, &SdtEmail) //DESTINATÁRIO RetornaEmailFaturamento.Call(EmpCod, CteDesCod, &SdtEmail) Case &FilEnvEml = EmailEnvolvidosCte.RemetenteTomador //REMETENTE RetornaEmailFaturamento.Call(EmpCod, CteRemCod, &SdtEmail) //TOMADOR RetornaEmailFaturamento.Call(EmpCod, CteTomCod, &SdtEmail) Case &FilEnvEml = EmailEnvolvidosCte.DestinatarioTomador //DESTINATÁRIO RetornaEmailFaturamento.Call(EmpCod, CteDesCod, &SdtEmail) //TOMADOR RetornaEmailFaturamento.Call(EmpCod, CteTomCod, &SdtEmail) Case &FilEnvEml = EmailEnvolvidosCte.Todos //REMETENTE RetornaEmailFaturamento.Call(EmpCod, CteRemCod, &SdtEmail) //DESTINATÁRIO RetornaEmailFaturamento.Call(EmpCod, CteDesCod, &SdtEmail) //TOMADOR RetornaEmailFaturamento.Call(EmpCod, CteTomCod, &SdtEmail) EndCase
Exit EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'CarregaNfe'
For each order EmpCod,FilCod,NfeCod Where EmpCod = &wwpContext.EmpCod Where FilCod = &MDFeNFeFilCod Where NfeCod = &MdfeNfeCod RetornaEmailFaturamento.call(EmpCod, NfeCliCod, &SdtEmail) exit EndFor
EndSub
